The third instalment in the comedy series, with Jason Biggs, Alyson Hannigan, Seann William Scott, Eddie Kaye Thomas and Eugene Levy

programme.title: Transformers (2007)
programme.desc: Teenager Sam Witwicky is treated to his first car by his dad, but it turns out to be an alien scout with a life of its own. Before long, the vehicle embroils Sam in a long-running intergalactic war between two factions of giant shape-changing robots, which have come to Earth to find a mystical cube that grants infinite power to its possessor. Michael Bay's sci-fi action adventure, inspired by the toy franchise, with Shia LaBeouf, Megan Fox, Josh Duhamel, Jon Voight and John Turturro

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring (2001)
programme.desc: An unassuming hobbit is plunged into a battle against the forces of darkness when his uncle bequeaths him a magical ring of immense power. He joins a fellowship of heroes to embark on a perilous quest to destroy the ring before it falls into the hands of its creator - a dark lord who needs it to regain his power and conquer the world. The first part of Peter Jackson's epic fantasy trilogy based on JRR Tolkien's novel, starring Elijah Wood, Ian McKellen, Viggo Mortensen, Sean Astin, Christopher Lee, Liv Tyler and Orlando Bloom

programme.title: The Mummy Returns (2001)
programme.desc: Married explorers Rick and Evelyn battle the newly resurrected mummy Imhotep and his ruthless partner, who have captured their son. The undead creature is heading for a confrontation with a legendary ancient warrior - with power over a magical army to be won. Fantasy adventure sequel, starring Brendan Fraser, Rachel Weisz, John Hannah, Arnold Vosloo, Oded Fehr and Patricia Velasquez, with a brief appearance by Dwayne Johnson

programme.title: The Scorpion King (2002)
programme.desc: A ruthless warlord resolves to rid the desert of its few remaining tribes, prompting them to seek the help of a legendary assassin to end the despot's reign of terror by destroying his source of power - a beautiful but deadly sorceress. Fantasy action adventure, starring Dwayne Johnson, Steven Brand, Kelly Hu and Michael Clarke Duncan

programme.title: Mean Machine (2001)
programme.desc: A disgraced soccer star jailed for assaulting two policemen is persuaded by the prison authorities to form a football team of inmates to take on the guards. Unfortunately, whipping his fellow prisoners into shape proves a tricky proposition. Comedy drama, starring Vinnie Jones, Jason Statham, David Hemmings and Jason Flemyng

programme.title: Role Models (2008)
programme.desc: Two irresponsible salesmen find themselves in trouble with the law after crashing their truck. To avoid jail, they agree to undertake community service looking after a couple of troubled kids. However, it soon seems that going to prison would have been the easier option. Comedy, starring Paul Rudd, Seann William Scott and Christopher Mintz-Plasse

programme.title: S.W.A.T. (2003)
programme.desc: A cop's career is seemingly over when he accidentally shoots a hostage while thwarting a bank robbery. He is given the chance to redeem himself by joining an elite unit headed by a veteran sergeant. Their mission is to escort an international crime lord in custody as he is taken to prison. However, they hit a snag when their prisoner offers a multimillion-dollar reward to anyone who breaks him out of jail, placing them under attack from every criminal in the city. Action thriller, starring Samuel L Jackson and Colin Farrell

programme.title: Transformers (2007)
programme.desc: Teenager Sam Witwicky is treated to his first car by his dad, but it turns out to be an alien scout with a life of its own. Before long, the vehicle embroils Sam in a long-running intergalactic war between two factions of giant shape-changing robots, which have come to Earth to find a mystical cube that grants infinite power to its possessor. Michael Bay's sci-fi action adventure, inspired by the toy franchise, with Shia LaBeouf, Megan Fox, Josh Duhamel, Jon Voight and John Turturro

programme.title: We Bury the Dead (2024)
programme.desc: When an experimental military weapon accidentally devastates Tasmania, volunteers travel to the island to help authorities identify the dead. Among them is a Ava Newman, who secretly hopes to find her missing husband. However, some of the bodies seem to be returning to life. Horror, starring Daisy Ridley, Brenton Thwaites and Mark Coles Smith

programme.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites (2025)
programme.desc: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one last terrifying case involving mysterious entities they must confront. Supernatural mystery drama, starring Vera Farmiga, Patrick Wilson and Elliot Cowan

programme.desc: An eight-year-old girl experiences life on her family's Rhodesian farm during the final stages of the Bush War. Drama, written, directed by and starring Embeth Davidtz, with Lexi Ventner and Zikhona Bali

programme.title: The Shadow's Edge (2025)
programme.desc: A brilliant cyber-criminal gang evades the police's state-of-the-art surveillance system with a haul worth billions. Retired tracking expert Wong Tak-Chong is ushered back into active service to mentor rookie officer He Qiuguo and build an elite unit to stop the criminals. Action thriller, starring Jackie Chan, Zhang Zifeng and Tony Leung Ka-fai

programme.title: Honey Don't (2025)
programme.desc: California private detective Honey O'Donahue delves into a series of unusual deaths connected to a mysterious church. Co-writer/director Ethan Coen's comedy mystery, starring Margaret Qualley, Aubrey Plaza and Chris Evans

programme.title: The Running Man (2025)
programme.desc: Desperate to save his sick daughter, Ben Richards enters a deadly televised competition where contestants must survive 30 days while being hunted by professional assassins. Director Edgar Wright's comedy thriller based on the Stephen King story, starring Glen Powell, Lee Pace and Josh Brolin

programme.desc: Catherine Earnshaw is raised by her alcoholic father at a Yorkshire farmhouse, with Nelly Dean as a constant companion. Mr Earnshaw 'acquires' an orphaned boy named Heathcliff during one of his gallivants and gifts the waif to Cathy as her pet. The children become inseparable, and as adults they embark on a destructive relationship. Writer-director Emerald Fennell's drama based on Emily Bronte's romance, starring Margot Robbie, Jacob Elordi and Martin Clunes

programme.desc: Expert criminologists look into the mind of William Suff, who was convicted of killing 12 women in Riverside County, California, throughout the 1980s, and now sits on death row

programme.title: Murder Uncut
programme.desc: Texas police suspect a killer is on the loose when the bodies of four women are discovered by the side of a highway

programme.title: Murders That Shocked the Nation
programme.sub-title: John Haigh - The Acid Bath Murderer
programme.desc: Fred Dinenage investigates the murders committed in 1940s London by John George Haigh, who dissolved his victims' bodies in concentrated sulphuric acid before selling their possessions. He was convicted of the murders of six people, though he had pleaded insanity and claimed to have killed nine

programme.title: Britain's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: The story of 27-year-old Pawel Relowicz, who raped and killed 21-year-old Hull student Libby Squire in a case that made headlines around the UK

programme.title: Send in the Dogs
programme.desc: Cocker spaniel Diesel helps his handler PC Adele Gibson and the Territorial Support Group raids a suspected drug den. programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness the best and worst behaviour on the nation's busiest motorway

programme.title: Caught Red Handed

programme.title: Caught Red Handed

programme.desc: The Empress of Britain, an enormous, palatial ocean liner that also doubled up as a fabulous first-class cruise ship for the super wealthy. Her fame and appeal was short-lived after the Empress of Britain was called up for war duty

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: The tragic and chilling events that unfolded in 1692 in Salem, Massachusetts, plunging the small town into a frenzy of fear and suspicion. Accusations of witchcraft tore through Salem, leading to trials and executions that left an indelible mark on American history. Actor Laurence Fishburne explores how paranoia and superstition gripped the community, resulting in the wrongful accusations and tragic deaths of numerous individuals accused of practising witchcraft, kown now as the Salem Witch Trials

Louisiana homicide detective Rod Demery and geneticist, archaeologist and forensics expert Professor Turi King begin by looking at the so-called Rosemarkie Man, the remains of a person brutally murdered more than 1,400 years ago

programme.title: Junk & Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry Cole and his partners in grime Allen Millyard and Guy Willison hit the road again in their relentless hunt for automotive treasures - this time they visit renowned collector Francis and secure a vintage Kawasaki at the National Motorcycle Museum's autumn auction. programme.title: Against All Odds (1984)
programme.desc: A nightclub owner with powerful and sinister connections hires a jobless American footballer to track down his runaway girlfriend hiding out in Mexico. The search leads to a remote island, where events take a complicated turn when the wayward girlfriend and the footballer start to fall for each other. Thriller, starring Jeff Bridges, Rachel Ward, James Woods, Richard Widmark and Jane Greer

programme.title: On Swift Horses (2025)
programme.desc: Mild-mannered war veteran Lee Walker plans a life of quiet domesticity in California with his wife Muriel and younger brother Julius. Restless after an early discharge from the US Army, Julius steals money from Lee to seek his fortune in Nevada, where he lands a job in security at a casino and sparks forbidden desire with co-worker Henry, which is consummated away from prying eyes. Back in their hotel room, Julius and Henry fantasise about using the same underhand tactics as card sharps to line their pockets. Drama, starring Daisy Edgar-Jones, Jacob Elordi and Will Poulter

programme.title: Terms of Endearment (1983)
programme.desc: A woman supports her daughter despite their differences over three tumultuous decades. The indomitable matriarch disapproves of her daughter's marriage and finds grandmotherhood hard to get used to, but is fiercely protective of her family when tragedy strikes. Oscar-winning drama, starring Shirley MacLaine, Debra Winger, Jack Nicholson, Danny DeVito and Jeff Daniels

programme.title: Widow Clicquot (2023)
programme.desc: In the late 18th century, a group of women create the Veuve Clicquot champagne business. Drama, starring Haley Bennett, Tom Sturridge and Sam Riley

programme.title: Ferrari (2023)
programme.desc: During the summer of 1957, ex-racecar driver Enzo Ferrari is in crisis. Bankruptcy stalks the company he and his wife, Laura, built from nothing a decade earlier. Their tempestuous marriage struggles with the mourning for one son and the acknowledgement of another. Attempting to secure their survival, he rolls the dice on one race - 1,000 miles across Italy, the iconic Mille Miglia. Director Michael Mann's drama, starring Adam Driver and Jack O'Connell

programme.title: Wuthering Heights (2026)
programme.desc: Catherine Earnshaw is raised by her alcoholic father at a Yorkshire farmhouse, with Nelly Dean as a constant companion. Mr Earnshaw 'acquires' an orphaned boy named Heathcliff during one of his gallivants and gifts the waif to Cathy as her pet. The children become inseparable, and as adults they embark on a destructive relationship. Writer-director Emerald Fennell's drama based on Emily Bronte's romance, starring Margot Robbie, Jacob Elordi and Martin Clunes

programme.title: The Girl on the Train (2016)
programme.desc: Having lost her job and her husband, alcoholic Rachel Watson spends time aimlessly travelling on a train. She gets drawn into a web of intrigue when she becomes fascinated by a woman's disappearance. Rachel thinks she has vital evidence in cracking the case, but gaps in her memory cloud her judgment, and before long her own life is endangered. Thriller based on Paula Hawkins' novel, starring Emily Blunt, Rebecca Ferguson, Haley Bennett, Justin Theroux and Luke Evans

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy (2025)
programme.desc: Recently widowed Bridget enters the dating game once again, caught between her son's science teacher and a man 20 years her junior. Romantic comedy, starring Renee Zellweger, Chiwetel Ejiofor, Hugh Grant, Leo Woodall and Colin Firth

programme.title: The Legend of Tarzan (2016)
programme.desc: Economic unrest ensues after King Leopold cuts off access to the Belgian Congo, so years after leaving his old home behind, Tarzan is lured back from Victorian England hoping to stabilise matters. However, he soon finds he has been lured into a deadly trap orchestrated by one of Leopold's envoys. Adventure, starring Alexander Skarsgard, Margot Robbie and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: Wuthering Heights (2026)

programme.title: Bullet Train (2022)
programme.desc: Unlucky US assassin Ladybug is given a simple mission - retrieve a metal briefcase on a high-speed train departing from Tokyo. The pick-up is too easy, but Ladybug discovers that four other killers are on board the same train, and that their missions have something in common. John Wick director David Leitch's comedy thriller, starring Brad Pitt, Joey King, Aaron Taylor-Johnson and Sandra Bullock

programme.title: SAS: Red Notice (2021)
programme.desc: Off-duty SAS soldier Tom Buckingham attempts to thwart a terror attack on a train running through the Channel Tunnel. Despite being injured, Buckingham is the only chance of survival for the passengers. Action thriller based on the novel by Andy McNab, starring Sam Heughan, Ruby Rose, Andy Serkis, Hannah John-Kamen and Tom Hopper

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October (1990)
programme.desc: A Soviet submarine commander creates an international crisis by piloting his experimental nuclear vessel, which is invisible to sonar, toward the American coast. The US and Russian navies think he is planning to attack and set out to destroy the submarine, but a CIA analyst suspects he intends to defect to the West. Cold War thriller, based on Tom Clancy's novel, starring Sean Connery, Alec Baldwin and James Earl Jones

programme.title: Bullet Train (2022)
programme.desc: Unlucky US assassin Ladybug is given a simple mission - retrieve a metal briefcase on a high-speed train departing from Tokyo. The pick-up is too easy, but Ladybug discovers that four other killers are on board the same train, and that their missions have something in common. John Wick director David Leitch's comedy thriller, starring Brad Pitt, Joey King, Aaron Taylor-Johnson and Sandra Bullock

programme.title: The Running Man (2025)
programme.desc: Desperate to save his sick daughter, Ben Richards enters a deadly televised competition where contestants must survive 30 days while being hunted by professional assassins. Director Edgar Wright's comedy thriller based on the Stephen King story, starring Glen Powell, Lee Pace and Josh Brolin

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal (1973)
programme.desc: A group of conspirators contracts the Jackal, a professional hitman, to assassinate President Charles de Gaulle of France. The killer starts to put his painstaking plans into action, creating a new identity, establishing his alibi and commissioning a custom-made weapon, while out-foxing the French police at every turn. Fred Zinnemann's adaptation of Frederick's Forsyth thriller, with Edward Fox, Michael Lonsdale, Alan Badel, Tony Britton and Cyril Cusack

programme.title: The Legend of Tarzan (2016)
programme.desc: Economic unrest ensues after King Leopold cuts off access to the Belgian Congo, so years after leaving his old home behind, Tarzan is lured back from Victorian England hoping to stabilise matters. However, he soon finds he has been lured into a deadly trap orchestrated by one of Leopold's envoys. Adventure, starring Alexander Skarsgard, Margot Robbie and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: The Bourne Identity (2002)
programme.desc: A fishing boat crew plucks a man out of the sea with two bullet wounds in his back and a safety-deposit number sewn into his skin - but absolutely no memory of who he is or how he got there. In the search for his true identity, he is pursued by assassins - but his skill at evading them suggests his own past is far from straightforward. Thriller, starring Matt Damon, Franka Potente, Chris Cooper, Clive Owen and Brian Cox

programme.title: The Running Man (2025)
programme.desc: Desperate to save his sick daughter, Ben Richards enters a deadly televised competition where contestants must survive 30 days while being hunted by professional assassins. Director Edgar Wright's comedy thriller based on the Stephen King story, starring Glen Powell, Lee Pace and Josh Brolin

programme.title: Jaws (1975)
programme.desc: A New England seaside town's tourist season is turned into a nightmare by a giant killer shark. The local police chief's efforts to protect the public are thwarted by the greedy mayor, forcing him to join forces with a grizzled fisherman and an enthusiastic marine biologist to hunt and kill the monster predator. Steven Spielberg's blockbusting thriller, starring Roy Scheider, Richard Dreyfuss and Robert Shaw, with an Oscar-winning score by John Williams. The film also won Academy Awards for Best Sound and Best Film Editing

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy (2004)
programme.desc: The amnesiac assassin is living quietly in hiding, until his former employers come after him again and murder his girlfriend. A CIA operation has ended in disaster, and those responsible intend to clear their names by implicating Bourne. As the former secret agent tries to evade the hitmen on his trail, he also struggles to piece together the truth about his past. Action thriller sequel, starring Matt Damon, Brian Cox, Joan Allen and Julia Stiles

programme.title: The Bourne Legacy (2012)
programme.desc: The leaders of a secret government agency plan to eliminate several agents as part of a cover-up when they face having their dark secrets exposed. One of the targets is able to evade his fate and go on the run - but his escape is threatened by his dependence on drugs to boost his physical and mental capabilities. Spy thriller sequel, with Jeremy Renner, Rachel Weisz and Edward Norton

programme.title: Logan's Run (1976)
programme.desc: In a hedonistic futuristic city, euthanasia is compulsory for everyone over 30. A law enforcer whose job is to kill anyone who tries to escape is given the task of exposing an underground movement. To do so, his body clock is fast-forwarded, giving him a taste of life on the run. Sci-fi thriller, starring Michael York, Jenny Agutter, Farrah Fawcett and Peter Ustinov

programme.title: The Radleys (2024)
programme.desc: A seemingly ordinary family hide a dark secret, but eventually parents Helen and Peter are forced to confront who they are, with the help of Peter's twin brother, Will. Director Euros Lyn's horror comedy co-written by Jo Brand, starring Kelly Macdonald, Damian Lewis and Sophia Di Martino

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King (2003)
programme.desc: As hobbits Frodo and Sam near the end of their journey into the dark lands of Mordor to destroy the One Ring, the evil Sauron unleashes the full might of his armies on Middle-earth. Meanwhile, Aragorn must fulfil his destiny of becoming king by leading his people into a climactic battle with the forces of darkness. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Elijah Wood, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen and Sean Astin

programme.title: My Floating Home
programme.desc: Londoners Lily and Natasha are in their mid-twenties and keen to get onto the property ladder. Currently renting a one-bed flat in east London, they have impulsively decided to buy a 35-year-old narrowboat at a knock-down price that needs considerable work. They are determined to save money and do all the work themselves, but it's a significant challenge as neither has any experience of fixing up - or living on - a boat, let alone any knowledge of plumbing, electrics, fabrication work or anything renovation-relevant

programme.desc: The island is rocked when Saint Marie's governor Caroline Bamber drops dead at her leaving party, with the commissioner standing right next to her. programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A fashion show takes a chilling turn when young model Zoe Mackay is strangled just moments after leaving the catwalk, and while the crew and other models come under suspicion, they all have watertight alibis. To make matters worse, there are no witnesses or DNA evidence, the only clue being a single stocking clasped in the victim's hand. What does it mean - and how was her killer able to strike without being spotted? Meanwhile, Florence tries to help Humphrey improve his social skills with the opposite sex, and JP recognises one of the models as a school crush on at school. But will she remember him?

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: More stories from the documentary series that looks at the 28 bridges that cross the notorious Rio Grande, between Texas and Mexico, and provide a gateway for legitimate goods and a lucrative pipeline for illegal contraband, weapons and drugs. Officers in Eagle Pass seize over 15 kilograms of heroin and unveil a new cartel drug-smuggling tactic, and a Mexican family in Laredo makes a plea for humanitarian parole

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers hand over a convict to Mexican authorities in the middle of the Juarez Lincoln bridge, and a man drops a marijuana joint on a customs floor in Progreso

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: Team Salvage get busy with a midnight mission - when multiple machines get into trouble, the crew find themselves on the edge of a breakdown.

programme.title: Rick Stein's India
programme.desc: The chef goes in search of the best chicken korma in Lucknow, learns the complexities of making rice dish pulao and joins partygoers at one of India's major Hindu festivals. In Punjab, he observes the age-old process involved in the production of the unrefined sugar known as jaggery and is recruited as a guest judge to find the state's new Star Chef. Rick also demonstrates how to make nimish, a dessert with hints of saffron, pistachios and cardamom, and paneer jalfrezi

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by radio presenter Sara Cox, comedian Jason Manford, journalist Nick Robinson and actor Harry Shearer, who aim to help the team captains deceive their opponents with plausible lies. Hosted by Rob Brydon

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Comedy panel show, hosted by Rob Brydon, in which team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by celebrity guests Adrian Edmondson, Claude Littner, Cariad Lloyd and Jordan Stephens to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Lucy Beaumont, Shazia Mirza, Joe Thomas and Jake Wood test their general knowledge skills in the hope of winning a prize

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels the length of California. He climbs to the top of one of the world's tallest trees, and meets the fire crews tasked with tackling the ever-present danger of wildfires, a growing threat given the state's changing climate and chronic shortage of water. He also meets street doctors providing much-needed medical support to people living in extreme poverty and visits a city on the desert for Americans who have dropped out of the rat race entirely

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The motoring show has a taste of luxury as Jeremy Clarkson road-tests Mercedes' Maybach, the largest and most lavish limousine in the world, and celebrates the 30th birthday of the car that has carried dictators, directors and despots, the Mercedes S Class. Plus, the Jaguar XJ and the Bentley Arnage T. Jonathan Ross is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The boys are joined by quintessential 'It' girl Tara Palmer-Tomkinson, as Jeremy Clarkson tests Renault's futuristic car the Vel Satis and Richard Hammond drives the BMW Z4 roadster

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers examine food found in British woodlands, preparing a wild boar ragu and a creamy fool with brambles picked from a hedgerow. They also explore the long history of poaching in the UK and show which plants can be used to make medicine

programme.title: Gadget Man
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade focuses on technology for protection and security, making sure the Gadget Man house is kitted out with a smartphone-activated lock, scanning visitors with a portable metal detector and putting a robot on patrol. He is joined by actor Keith Allen to test a wallet tracker, a vest that makes the wearer look more muscular and a bulletproof bag, and also meets up with comedian Bill Bailey at a Cold War era nuclear bunker in Essex to try out a post-apocalyptic survival kit - much of which can also be used for camping holidays or festivals

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The explorer travels from Texas to southern Mexico, meeting a woman who risks her life to take supplies to migrants stranded on the Mexican side of the border in Reynosa, one of the country's most violent cities, which is dominated by a powerful criminal organisation. He also ventures into the rainforest to explore the Maya city of Yaxchilan, and meets the modern-day descendants of this civilisation, who are increasingly marginalised and treated as second-class citizens

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson pits the Audi RS6 against its rival, the Mercedes E55 AMG, the engineers from Lotus are faced with the challenge of turning an old Lada into a top-notch machine and the Maserati 4200 GT is put through its paces. Plus, a bunch of white van drivers battle it out on the test track, and Michael Gambon is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Rick Parfitt of Status Quo joins Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and Jason Dawe as they show off the Peugeot RC concept car and enter a lively debate about transport and the environment. Plus, the team test-drives the Maserati 4200 GT, while vicars, rabbis and mullahs take to the track to prove which faith moves fastest

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers celebrate Britain's taste for exotic food, one of the driving forces of its culinary history. They prepare chilli gingerbread and demonstrate how to make perfect sushi, travel to Tatton Park in Cheshire to learn why pineapples were once extremely expensive and reveal the history of the Onion Johnnie Man

programme.title: Rick Stein's India
programme.desc: The chef arrives in the state of Rajasthan, a land of palaces and hilltop forts, where he cooks a biryani fit for a royal banquet. He then heads north to the mountainous region of Himachal Pradesh, and joins local nobility at a gathering in their home village and has an audience with the Dalai Lama

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: More stories from the documentary series that looks at the 28 bridges that cross the notorious Rio Grande, between Texas and Mexico, and provide a gateway for legitimate goods and a lucrative pipeline for illegal contraband, weapons and drugs. programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers hand over a convict to Mexican authorities in the middle of the Juarez Lincoln bridge, and a man drops a marijuana joint on a customs floor in Progreso

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: Team Salvage get busy with a midnight mission - when multiple machines get into trouble, the crew find themselves on the edge of a breakdown.

programme.title: Rick Stein's India
programme.desc: The chef goes in search of the best chicken korma in Lucknow, learns the complexities of making rice dish pulao and joins partygoers at one of India's major Hindu festivals. In Punjab, he observes the age-old process involved in the production of the unrefined sugar known as jaggery and is recruited as a guest judge to find the state's new Star Chef. Rick also demonstrates how to make nimish, a dessert with hints of saffron, pistachios and cardamom, and paneer jalfrezi

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels the length of California. He climbs to the top of one of the world's tallest trees, and meets the fire crews tasked with tackling the ever-present danger of wildfires, a growing threat given the state's changing climate and chronic shortage of water. He also meets street doctors providing much-needed medical support to people living in extreme poverty and visits a city on the desert for Americans who have dropped out of the rat race entirely

programme.title: Top Gear

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Two ageing patients flirt while waiting in the surgery, and Ruth gently persuades them they might be right for each other. Michelle is not impressed with Mike when he turns up late for dinner, having gone to the pub with Archie after work. Meanwhile, Nick and Caroline decide to spend the day together. Guest starring Jean Boht

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Michelle confronts two shoplifters, but her act of heroism receives little thanks. Ronnie finds Eva working undercover and promises not to reveal her identity, even to Jimmi, and Nick plans the perfect moment to reveal a surprise for Caroline. Former Bad Girls actor James Gaddas guest stars

programme.title: Holby City
programme.sub-title: Be Careful What You Wish For
programme.desc: Jess goes in for a routine scan, which exposes how many weeks pregnant she is. When she begins bleeding, Mubbs is forced to reveal this information in surgery - which in turn proves that Sean cannot be the father. Mark considers resuming his relationship with Tricia, although Chrissie isn't sure it's a wise move. Mickie pressures Jodie for the truth, and the resulting revelation prompts Will to consider resigning, until an incident involving a patient convinces him otherwise - but Jodie is still plotting revenge

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: Emma Samms (Dynasty's Fallon Carrington Colby) stars in the show's 25th anniversary episode, as a woman mistakenly convinced she is being pursued by a stranger. Meanwhile, new nurse Lloyd's life is placed in jeopardy when he refuses to break his moral code and lie to a patient, and Zoe is surprised to learn Dylan helps paramedics at the scene of accidents on a voluntary basis. With Sunetra Sarker and Michael Obiora

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Carver is angry when he is forced to take care of a suspected cop killer's family

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Peggy makes a decision that will haunt her forever, Rainie wreaks her own special brand of havoc, and Walford says goodbye to a much-loved pair

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Phil's despair leads him down a dark path, and the Trueman-Foxes must attend yet another funeral. Meanwhile, Carol's old vices rear their heads, and Max puts his foot down

programme.title: Harry Wild
programme.desc: Harry and Fergus are hired by a woman whose sister has gone missing in a sinister village in the countryside, and soon find a skeleton dumped in the woods. They unearth a glut of possible suspects, including a doctor's bitter wife, a creepy old gravedigger and an angry priest with a dark secret to hide

programme.title: The Doctor Blake Mysteries
programme.desc: Blake is called to investigate after a priest is found to have died in his confession booth from suspected bee stings, and discovers the church's other minister keeps his hives at the site - but would he resort to murder to get a promotion? Australian detective drama set in 1959, starring Craig McLachlan as maverick country town doctor Lucien Blake

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: A robbery at the local museum sets Lovejoy off on the trail of a hoard of Roman coins hidden on the Isle of Man - but he soon discovers two Americans are also searching for it. Drama, starring Ian McShane

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Trouble lies in store for Sharon when she finds romance, and Tracey starts a business venture with Dorien. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Compo and Foggy drink too much home brew at Ernie Mordue's funeral, resulting in bad hangovers for both of them. Bill Owen and Brian Wilde star

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Have You Got a Light Mate?
programme.desc: Howard asks Clegg to buy a china shepherdess from Auntie Wainwright's on his behalf, but she seems more interested in selling security lights. An unfortunate incident means that Foggy has to be rescued from the police. Peter Sallis and Brian Wilde star

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Foggy, Clegg and Compo get into another scrape after Howard asks them to deliver an unusual gift to Marina - a cast iron bath

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: The communists capture Von Strohm and Geering, but they are soon rescued by a Gaullist group, recovering a valuable painting in the process. Comedy, starring Richard Marner and Sam Kelly

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.sub-title: The Dance of the Hitler Youth
programme.desc: The Germans celebrate the burning of the Reichstag with a little Bavarian dancing, while Rene breaks into Herr Flick's lair and the British airmen attempt to cross the channel by rowing boat

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: Presuming Rene is dead, Edith hunts for his will and a new husband. Meanwhile, the airmen pose as nuns and Herr Flick enlists Lt Gruber's artistic expertise in distinguishing a real painting from two forgeries. Second World War comedy, starring Gorden Kaye

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The team investigates the mystery of a missing scientist, after the man's wife receives a series of emails from someone claiming to know what happened to him. The physics professor was last seen in 2004, on a train to Paris for a conference, and when he disappeared he was working on a potentially lucrative cold fusion project that had attracted attention from many large organisations. However, as the detectives dig deeper, a shadowy Whitehall figure warns Sandra's boss Strickland they should drop the case

programme.title: Dalziel & Pascoe
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. Convicted murderer Charlie Walker seizes his chance to escape while in transit across the moors. The next morning a barmaid is discovered dead - leaving the duo to figure out whether she was killed by the fugitive. Tim Healy and Lynda Bellingham guest star

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: A robbery at the local museum sets Lovejoy off on the trail of a hoard of Roman coins hidden on the Isle of Man - but he soon discovers two Americans are also searching for it. Drama, starring Ian McShane

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Trouble lies in store for Sharon when she finds romance, and Tracey starts a business venture with Dorien. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Monsieur Spade
programme.desc: The tragedy of the horrific murders are felt by all in the town. Pulled out of retirement, Spade begins to investigate, while Teresa keeps her cards close to her chest

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Brownlow tries to regain the team's confidence after publicly criticising their stop-and-search methods

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Nick is invited to a party celebrating Bob's life, and writes a touching eulogy to toast his former cancer patient. However, when he begins his speech he quickly realises his thoughts may have been put to paper too soon. Meanwhile, Bracken's life is put in danger during a visit to the Mill, and Eva crosses Jack's son Callum. Shaun Williamson guest stars

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: A lorry driver has to decide whether to give himself up following an accident or continue a new life with his family, and a witness to the incident tries to come to terms with what he has seen

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: The accident has left Will impaled on a scaffolding pole, with another man trapped underneath him and the rest of the structure likely to come down at any moment. Connie is called out to treat him, and realises moving either victim could cause serious injury to the other. Mickie tracks down Jodie, who claims the incident was a result of her falling unconscious at the wheel rather than a murder attempt

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: Ruth and Jay's relationship improves as they treat a boy whose worsening condition as the result of a fall requires urgent surgery to relieve the pressure on his brain. Lloyd is charged with caring for a cantankerous man who flees the hospital, prompting the nurse to follow him - only to make a shocking discovery at the patient's home. Medical drama, guest starring Julian Glover (Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade), with Georgia Taylor and Ben Turner

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Brownlow tries to regain the team's confidence after publicly criticising their stop-and-search methods

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Shirley is sickened by a devastating discovery as Phil and Rainie continue their seedy drugs binge. Meanwhile Janine shocks no-one more than herself with a question for Ryan

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Ryan and Janine's crippling defences start to crumble - is there hope for happiness there? Meanwhile a frustrated Max goads Jack to breaking point

programme.title: Harry Wild
programme.desc: When a hen party ends in murder, Harry and Fergus are hired by the bridezilla to make sure her big day goes ahead without a hitch. Harry and Fergus are faced with an impossible murder and five best friends who all hated the dead woman

programme.title: The Doctor Blake Mysteries
programme.desc: Family members are found slain at their breakfast table, and Dr Lucien Blake knows something about the scene doesn't seem right, but can't put his finger on it. Meanwhile, Jean's wayward son returns unexpectedly and causes quite a stir in the household

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: A bereaved couple hire Lovejoy to find a pair of Regency duelling pistols and bring about the downfall of a murderer - but to complete the task he is forced to risk Jane's life and fight a duel. Anthony Valentine guest stars, with Ian McShane

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Dorien's passion for mind control causes problems, Tracey finds a new pet spider, and Sharon has tooth trouble while eating peanuts

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Foggy, Clegg and an enthusiastic Compo plot to save Smiler from the terrible fate of being Nora Batty's ex-lodger

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Foggy comes up with the crazy idea of safety underwear after he collides with Compo while riding his old bicycle. Meanwhile, Howard tries several futile methods of increasing his height after concluding Pearl is attracted to taller men

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: There Are Gypsies at the Bottom of the Garden
programme.desc: Foggy launches a series of nature tours after coming to believe he has discovered the nesting place of a giant woodpecker. Brian Wilde stars

programme.title: This Is Not a Murder Mystery
programme.desc: New guests arrive at West Dean, bringing tension and poor manners. As Quant and Thistlethwaite race to connect dots, a masked figure with a face of roses emerges

programme.title: The Chelsea Detective
programme.desc: Part one of two. Max looks into the disappearance of a social media star married to the owner of an upmarket eatery and part of the Romanos, a combustible clan of restaurateurs. Adrian Scarborough stars

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The team reinvestigates the killing of notorious biker-gang leader Eddie Chapman when his son's girlfriend brings them new information about his death. She reveals her partner must avenge his father's murder as part of a final initiation into the gang, but believes the wrong man is being targeted. Meanwhile, Sandra is forced to reassess her position at Ucos when a former colleague suggests she is wasting her career. Starring Amanda Redman, with her real-life daughter Emily Glenister in a supporting role

programme.title: Dalziel & Pascoe
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. The mismatched detectives investigate the murder of businessman Richard Mattis and discover a family tormented by sinister secrets. A second body found in the canal behind Mattis's factory makes matters even more puzzling. Warren Clarke, Colin Buchanan and Alison Steadman star

programme.title: Motorhoming with Merton & Webster
programme.desc: Paul Merton and Suki Webster explore Devon, beginning by heading to Dartmoor national park to meet a local guide for a Sherlock Holmes-themed tour, as It was in the national park that Arthur Conan Doyle was inspired to write The Hound of the Baskervilles. Paul and Suki also meet Kate and Norman, who are part of the Wheeled Access group, which encourages anyone with a disability to get out and enjoy the area

programme.title: Motorhoming with Merton & Webster
programme.desc: Paul Merton and Suki Webster explore Snowdonia and pitch up at Lake Bala, where they meet a couple who have converted an old horsebox into a family-sized motorhome. Paul and Sue sample some of the many watersports available, starting with paddle boarding and ending with a little synchronised swimming. The following day they're off to the Mach Loop valley - a famous flight path for the RAF fighter pilot training at nearby Anglesey

programme.title: Fred Dibnah's Magnificent Monuments
programme.desc: Visits to historic places of work, including one of Britain's oldest dockyards in Chatham Kent, and Armley Mill in Leeds. At a 1,000-year-old tithe barn in Sussex, the steeplejack tries his hand at thatching, before getting a surprise on the top floor of the architecturally esteemed Lloyd's building in the City of London

programme.title: Fred Dibnah's Magnificent Monuments
programme.desc: The former steeplejack explores the achievements of Britain's civil engineering pioneers, visiting the Channel Tunnel, Humber Bridge and Pontcysyllte Aqueduct. He also has a go at legging a narrowboat through a canal tunnel in Dudley in the West Midlands

programme.title: Fred Dibnah's Magnificent Monuments
programme.desc: The steeplejack looks at structures that have been built for arts, leisure and entertainment purposes, including the Globe Theatre, the Victoria and Albert Museum and Blackpool Tower

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Account of Operation Barbarossa, Germany's plan to invade the Soviet Union in 1941, revealing the massive human and financial cost endured by the Soviet people, who fought a bloody and lonely war with little support from the Allies. Narrated by Laurence Olivier

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: The team struggles to explain how a DAF 33 gearbox works, and office manager Sarah attempts to bring order to the auto memorabilia sale

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Anglophile Derek struggles to get his message across on a rare trip abroad to pick up a Bentley, while a well-restored Ford XR2 sets the auction alight

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave finds a very rare 70s Sunbeam Lotus that has been rotting away in a farmyard for 29 years, while a Morris Minor convertible goes under the hammer

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A delightful collection of British classics comes up for auction, including an Austin A35 and a Hillman Avenger Estate in stunning condition. An E-Type Jaguar also hits the auction

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of a car auction business. A near-perfect 50s Chevy panel van and a very desirable low-mileage 80s Brooklands Capri tempt auctioneer Derek out of Yorkshire

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Footage of animals that have unusual means of finding their way around. Dung beetles are able to navigate by the sky, using the position of the sun, moon and stars to determine which is the right direction to go in, while pigeons display remarkable powers of memory, able to recall complex travel routes and follow manmade roads and hedgerows

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: How the myth of German invincibility was finally debunked by their defeat at the Battle of Stalingrad. Narrated by Laurence Olivier

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Arkwright comes up with a cunning plan and invents a Saint's day so that Granville can check the pockets of a foreign visitor who he suspects of shoplifting

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Comedy, starring Lee Mack and Tim Vine. Tim arrives home after a night out clubbing and realises he has picked up the wrong coat, one which contains a pocket full of drugs. After discovering the owner is Larry 'the Butcher' Stubbs, he enlists Lee's help to return the jacket without ending up in serious danger

programme.title: The Power of Parker
programme.desc: The morning after the night before has not started well. Diane is worried that she did not impress the school governors, Kath is revealing more than she should to the women in the old people's home and Martin is desperately trying to get his hands on a chunk of cash

programme.title: Don't Wait Up
programme.desc: Tom speculates that Toby must be seeing a woman when he stays out all night - but in fact he was helping a colleague who had suffered a heart attack

programme.title: The Power of Parker
programme.desc: Moneylenders move in on Martin's family, leaving him with no choice but to fight back. Meanwhile, Diane and Kath decide to pursue Martin in the hope that they can work out what he's up to. They follow him to his accountant's house, but when Alan refuses to get involved Martin takes matters into his own hands and decides to confront the Slater Brothers in a backstreet nightclub. Comedy co-written by and starring Sian Gibson, with George Costigan, Conleth Hill, Rosie Cavaliero, Sheila Reid and Jason Barnett

programme.title: The Power of Parker
programme.desc: Martin gets into even deeper water with the Slater brothers, while accountant Alan has surprising information for Kath and Diane, providing them with the perfect opportunity to get revenge on the philandering businessman. programme.sub-title: Here We Go into the Wild Blue Yonder
programme.desc: Part one of two. Compo yearns to reach for the skies in a hang-glider to impress Nora Batty, but finds a challenge to climb a tree more than enough to handle. programme.desc: Granville tries to persuade Arkwright to buy a van, as he is fed up with having to struggle doing the rounds with the shop's outdated delivery bike. He is pleasantly surprised when his skinflint uncle agrees - until he takes the vehicle out on the road. Comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and David Jason

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.sub-title: Fig Biscuits and Inspirational Toilet Rolls
programme.desc: Arkwright decides to open the shop before dawn to catch the morning rush and tries a special promotion to get rid of some of the goods, including fig biscuits and toilet rolls

programme.title: Dad's Army
programme.desc: Captain Mainwaring devises a cunning new way of foiling Hitler's invasion plans - but it results in Pike getting tangled up in barbed wire on the beach in the middle of a minefield during manoeuvres. Comedy first aired in 1970, starring Arthur Lowe, Ian Lavender and John Le Mesurier

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Here We Go into the Wild Blue Yonder
programme.desc: Part one of two. Compo yearns to reach for the skies in a hang-glider to impress Nora Batty, but finds a challenge to climb a tree more than enough to handle. Meanwhile, the object of his affections pesters Wally to take her out for a meal. Long-running comedy set in rural Yorkshire, starring Bill Owen and Kathy Staff

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Here We Go Again into the Wild Blue Yonder
programme.desc: Part two of two. Wally finishes the hang-glider and declares that it is ready to be tested, so Compo steps into the fray. Long-running comedy set in rural Yorkshire, starring Bill Owen and Kathy Staff

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: While Richard contends with the idea of taking early retirement, Hyacinth telephones the prime minister asking if there is anything on the honours list for him. The hen-pecked husband's reservations about the future intensify when he discovers all the plans his spouse has in store for him. Comedy, starring Clive Swift and Patricia Routledge

programme.title: Dad's Army
programme.desc: Walker is accused of being a fifth columnist for smuggling Italian PoWs out of camp at night, but he claims to be patriotically furthering the war effort - while lining his own pockets at the same time. Comedy first broadcast in 1970, starring Arthur Lowe and James Beck

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Arkwright tries to improve the sale of an overstocked commodity - Jamaican Ginger cake - with incredible efficiency, and Granville's lust for power leads to disaster

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Arkwright comes up with a cunning plan and invents a Saint's day so that Granville can check the pockets of a foreign visitor who he suspects of shoplifting

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: In a desperate bid to prove his manliness, the happy-go-lucky Lee embarks on a camping trip with the object of his affections Lucy, his best mate Tim and his partner Daisy, but the spooky forest where they have chosen to pitch their tents could prove a little too intimidating for him to handle. Comedy, starring Lee Mack, Tim Vine, Sally Bretton and Katy Wix

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lucy has her god-daughter dumped on her overnight, which wouldn't be so bad except the girl's stay coincides with her birthday - leaving the inexperienced guardian and her flatmate Lee struggling to come up with appropriate entertainment for a bunch of excited nine-year-olds. Lee Mack and Sally Bretton star, with a guest appearance by Paul Kaye (Game of Thrones)

programme.title: Hi-de-Hi!

Comedy written by and starring Sian Gibson, with Conleth Hill and Rosie Cavaliero

programme.title: The Power of Parker
programme.desc: It's the big day for Kath and Diane as they attempt to finally exact their revenge on Martin. However, while Diane has never felt more alive, Kath seems to be having second thoughts. Comedy, written by and starring Sian Gibson, with Rosie Cavaliero, Conleth Hill, Sheila Reid and Steve Pemberton

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: When Tony's brother and his girlfriend pay a visit, their behaviour almost drives Gary to murder. However, when he finds out her parents have a holiday villa, the prospect of a free holiday soon changes his behaviour. Bachelor comedy, starring Martin Clunes and Neil Morrissey

Comedy, starring David Jason, Stephanie Cole, Tim Healy, Johnny Vegas and Sue Holderness

programme.title: Lies, Deceit and Betrayal
programme.desc: Two couples trying to secure their retirement each find themselves at the centre of an elaborate investment scam, giving thousands of pounds to someone who doesn't seem to exist

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: As part of the 2013 appeal, Nick Knowles and the team head to Peterborough to help Children in Need-funded organisation Little Miracles, which supports youngsters with disabilities and life-limiting illnesses and their families. However, whereas Mark, Chris, Julian and Billy normally renovate an existing property, for the first time they are knocking down a building and reconstructing it from the ground up - making it worth almost £1million. With just nine days to complete the job, they'll need help - and lots of it. Luckily, tradespeople turn out in force - from both the local area and across the country - giving their time for free

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: In the summer of 2015, West Sussex wife and mother-of-four Amanda fell off her bike while training for an endurance contest, breaking 11 bones, puncturing a lung, and snapping her collarbone and back. Paralysed, she spent the next six months at Stoke Mandeville's spinal unit, while her builder husband Vic looked after the children - but determined to compete again, she returned home in a wheelchair. However, the family home is no longer suitable for Amanda - so that's where Nick Knowles and the rest of the DIY SOS team come in, strengthened by a number of local tradesmen

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the DIY SOS team transform the home of a police officer who was a victim of the Westminster Bridge terrorist attack in March 2017, suffering horrific injuries which left him wheelchair bound. Months after the attack took place, Kris still resides in hospital as his north London home is inaccessible for him, so the team and hundreds of volunteers work to get Kris living back at home to his family

programme.title: Tipping Point

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Rescue Labrador Tom needs work with a serious wound on one of his front paws, and four-year-old French bulldog called Otis has suffered an accident while being chased by another dog. Professor Noel Fitzpatrick diagnoses a spinal problem high up in Otis's neck that requires surgery. Meanwhile, Bailey, a 10-year-old cocker spaniel, has quite a lot of pain in one of his hind limbs, but his owner wants to avoid surgery, and Noel needs to perform specialist imaging before he can offer any solutions

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: As the festive season approaches at Fitzpatrick Referrals, Professor Noel and his team treat three special patients. A one-year-old crossbreed puppy rescued by a charity from Romania is in need of complex surgery, with no guarantee of success. An eight-year-old Dalmatian needs work on its spinal cord, and a Labrador from Switzerland is having trouble walking. Noel's investigations reveal problems with both shoulder and elbow, an unusual combination that requires dramatic intervention

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: As part of the 2013 appeal, Nick Knowles and the team head to Peterborough to help Children in Need-funded organisation Little Miracles, which supports youngsters with disabilities and life-limiting illnesses and their families. programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs' Sake
programme.desc: Strictly Come Dancing and TOWIE star Pete Wicks immerses himself in the heart-warming and emotional world of dog care at Basildon's Dogs Trust rehoming centre. It's Pete's first day at Dogs Trust, and he meets a pug facing a worrying surgery and pregnant dog who was seized at the border

programme.title: Untold: The Disappearance of Shannon Matthews
programme.desc: In February 2008, nine-year-old Shannon Matthews vanishes on her way home from school, triggering one of the highest-profile missing person investigations ever seen in the UK. Her mother is distraught and the community rallies in support, but no trace of the child can be found

programme.title: Untold: The Disappearance of Shannon Matthews
programme.desc: In February 2008, nine-year-old Shannon Matthews vanishes on her way home from school, triggering one of the highest-profile missing person investigations ever seen in the UK. With increasing alarm sweeping through Shannon's hometown and Britain at large, the search for the missing nine-year-old grows in scale

programme.title: Psychopath with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: In 2007, when Paris Bennett was 13 years old, stabbed his four-year-old sister to death, a crime for which he has been behind bars ever since. Now 25 and in his first interview on British television, he tells Piers Morgan how this was no impulsive fit of rage but rather a cold, deliberate act planned as an act of revenge against his mother Charity - who is watching the interview unfold in a nearby room. She has stood by him even though she fears that when he gets out, he could still harbour violent intentions towards her - or even worse, towards his younger brother

programme.title: Lies, Deceit and Betrayal
programme.desc: After Louise meets her partner Andy Camfield, a series of financial mishaps begin to see her regularly giving him money

programme.title: Deadly Waters with Captain Lee
programme.desc: When a Florida couple goes missing, the discovery of a grisly bait freezer leads investigators to a surprise informant who claims the truth is hidden at sea

programme.title: The Gentle Art of Swedish Death Cleaning
programme.desc: The Death Cleaners meet Sue, who helped build a lesbian-safe section of Kansas City in the 80s and hasn't been able to tidy up since the love of her life died

programme.desc: In Dudley, Ash and Jamie blue light to a frightened young woman with severe chest pains. Rachel and Mick are called to assist the police with a prisoner in Stoke

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and team, together with West Bromwich volunteers, helps a grieving grandmother and her family who are making do in a small house. Sandra's daughter Crystal Chambers passed away in 2015, so she and Crystal's 19-year-old brother Ziggy are doing their best to raise youngsters Deago and Ameira amid cramped conditions

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Part one of two. Nick Knowles and the team undertake their biggest and longest build yet, constructing two buildings for the Grenfell community over several months to create spaces worth around £2million. With the aid of large construction companies, generous suppliers, volunteers and the Duke of Cambridge - who visits the site - the team starts by building a new home for the Dale Youth Boxing Club. The club started the careers of James DeGale, who won an Olympic gold medal in Beijing 10 years ago, and George Groves, current WBA Super Middleweight champion, as well as producing many national champions

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Part two of two. Nick Knowles and the team attempt to build a two storey flexible use centre, which can be used by the local community however it decides. The team are joined by the Duke of Cambridge, who meets local residents and talks to firefighters who were amongst the first responders on the night of the tragic fire at Grenfell Tower

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel Fitzpatrick treats Koa, a six-month-old Bouvier des Flandres who is suffering from a badly deformed back leg, causing huge pain. Patricia brings her beloved 11-year-old Rhodesian ridgeback, Kwanda, to Fitzpatrick's Guildford hospital with an eye infection that she fears may be the sign of something more sinister. Dr Laurent Findji confirms it is bad news - a malignant tumour

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel treats an 11-month-old dog who has a severely dislocated hip which Noel suspects is the result of trauma experienced at the tender age of only two months. Elsewhere, overweight Labradoodle Fletcher is brought into the veterinary practice all the way from Scotland after previous surgery to fix a bad ankle fracture has failed, and a tiny hedgehog needs treatment on his broken hind legs

With the aid of large construction companies, generous suppliers, volunteers and the Duke of Cambridge - who visits the site - the team starts by building a new home for the Dale Youth Boxing Club. The club started the careers of James DeGale, who won an Olympic gold medal in Beijing 10 years ago, and George Groves, current WBA Super Middleweight champion, as well as producing many national champions

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs' Sake
programme.desc: Pete meets a litter of puppies who were found abandoned in a crisp box, and helps the staff fight to keep them alive

programme.title: Annika
programme.desc: Morgan starts working at a remote Scottish eco-resort, but Annika's trip to visit her is interrupted when a local builder employed by the resort turns up dead in a nearby stream

programme.title: Stacey Dooley Sleeps Over
programme.desc: The investigative reporter aims to find out what life is like in modern Britain by spending 72 hours in the company of a wide range of extraordinary characters and families. She begins in Shepherd's Bush, where she visits married couple Thomas and Cathy and their seven-year-old son Stanley. Cathy and Thomas have an open relationship and live a polyamorous life - they also share their home with Australian Nicole, who is part of their relationship

programme.title: Killer Women with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: Journalist and TV personality Piers Morgan continues his travels across the USA, this time meeting two very different female murderers, both of whom killed someone they loved. First, he heads to Florida's largest female prison to visit Amanda Hutto, who is serving a life sentence for murdering her daughter. She was accused of deliberately 'dunking' her seven-year-old child as a punishment for being naughty, with her young son testifying against her at the murder trial. Next, he journeys to Texas, where he encounters Rhonda Glover, a former beauty queen and rodeo star who gunned down her lover in cold blood after their relationship spiralled into drug-fuelled obsession and paranoia

programme.title: Killer Women with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: Journalist and broadcaster Piers Morgan travels across the USA to meet some of America's most notorious female killers in a quest to discover what drives women to kill. He travels to Gatesville, Texas, to visit Erin Caffey, who masterminded the murder of her entire family at the age of 16, and will remain behind bars until she is almost 60. Piers finds out what made a typical teenager conspire with her boyfriend to kill her mum, dad, and two younger brothers, before meeting the only survivor of the tragedy, Erin's father Terry

programme.title: Deadly Waters with Captain Lee
programme.desc: When the body of a young woman is found in the coastal waters off Cape May, the chains binding her ankles could be the missing link to solving her murder

programme.title: Tipping Point

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: As part of the 2013 appeal, Nick Knowles and the team head to Peterborough to help Children in Need-funded organisation Little Miracles, which supports youngsters with disabilities and life-limiting illnesses and their families. However, whereas Mark, Chris, Julian and Billy normally renovate an existing property, for the first time they are knocking down a building and reconstructing it from the ground up - making it worth almost £1million. With just nine days to complete the job, they'll need help - and lots of it. Luckily, tradespeople turn out in force - from both the local area and across the country - giving their time for free

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: In the summer of 2015, West Sussex wife and mother-of-four Amanda fell off her bike while training for an endurance contest, breaking 11 bones, puncturing a lung, and snapping her collarbone and back. Paralysed, she spent the next six months at Stoke Mandeville's spinal unit, while her builder husband Vic looked after the children - but determined to compete again, she returned home in a wheelchair. However, the family home is no longer suitable for Amanda - so that's where Nick Knowles and the rest of the DIY SOS team come in, strengthened by a number of local tradesmen

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the DIY SOS team transform the home of a police officer who was a victim of the Westminster Bridge terrorist attack in March 2017, suffering horrific injuries which left him wheelchair bound. Months after the attack took place, Kris still resides in hospital as his north London home is inaccessible for him, so the team and hundreds of volunteers work to get Kris living back at home to his family

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Rescue Labrador Tom needs work with a serious wound on one of his front paws, and four-year-old French bulldog called Otis has suffered an accident while being chased by another dog. Professor Noel Fitzpatrick diagnoses a spinal problem high up in Otis's neck that requires surgery. Meanwhile, Bailey, a 10-year-old cocker spaniel, has quite a lot of pain in one of his hind limbs, but his owner wants to avoid surgery, and Noel needs to perform specialist imaging before he can offer any solutions

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: As the festive season approaches at Fitzpatrick Referrals, Professor Noel and his team treat three special patients. A one-year-old crossbreed puppy rescued by a charity from Romania is in need of complex surgery, with no guarantee of success. An eight-year-old Dalmatian needs work on its spinal cord, and a Labrador from Switzerland is having trouble walking. Noel's investigations reveal problems with both shoulder and elbow, an unusual combination that requires dramatic intervention

programme.title: Untold: The Disappearance of Shannon Matthews
programme.desc: In February 2008, nine-year-old Shannon Matthews vanishes on her way home from school, triggering one of the highest-profile missing person investigations ever seen in the UK. Her mother is distraught and the community rallies in support, but no trace of the child can be found

programme.title: The Supervet

Dr Laurent Findji confirms it is bad news - a malignant tumour

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel treats an 11-month-old dog who has a severely dislocated hip which Noel suspects is the result of trauma experienced at the tender age of only two months. Elsewhere, overweight Labradoodle Fletcher is brought into the veterinary practice all the way from Scotland after previous surgery to fix a bad ankle fracture has failed, and a tiny hedgehog needs treatment on his broken hind legs

programme.title: Psychopath with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: In 2007, when Paris Bennett was 13 years old, stabbed his four-year-old sister to death, a crime for which he has been behind bars ever since. Now 25 and in his first interview on British television, he tells Piers Morgan how this was no impulsive fit of rage but rather a cold, deliberate act planned as an act of revenge against his mother Charity - who is watching the interview unfold in a nearby room. She has stood by him even though she fears that when he gets out, he could still harbour violent intentions towards her - or even worse, towards his younger brother

programme.title: Killer Women with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: Broadcaster and journalist Piers Morgan travels across the USA to meet some of America's most notorious female murderers, in a quest to discover what drives a woman to kill. He travels to Lowell Correctional Institute in Florida to talk to Rebecca Fenton, convicted for the murder of her husband Larry, who was shot dead in their home. He also looks into the details of the case, learning how for several years it seemed she was going to get away with the crime, until the involvement of the FBI helped bring her to justice

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: The Mathewsons take in a 1982 Audi Quattro and a Sunbeam Alpine. Plus, Derek takes delivery of a beautiful green Renault van, previously used as a bread van in Paris

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Gus and Will want to buy a classic Rover, but have to go for a Honda-based 800 coupe. At only £650 it seems too good to be true - and when they turn up, they aren't completely sure whether to proceed

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien attempt to restore items including an old cheese press, and a 1980s motorbike almost gets the better of Henry and his restorer Guy

programme.title: Trawlermen: Hunting the Catch
programme.desc: Storm Arwen hits the UK and the skippers have tough decisions to make. Boats start to roll in the North Sea, putting Victory Rose and Our Lass at risk of collision. Skipper Darren has just three days of crabbing time before the storm pushes the boat back to the harbour and George Jack considers venturing in to the storm in search of a new species of prawn

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Make It at Market
programme.desc: After worrying her autism would stop her developing her skills, Belinda has become a talented glassblower with the potential to turn her art into a money-making business. Paul and Becky have a passion for upcycling furniture and are hoping to turn their hobby into a day job. Dom Chinea and his team of experts meets all three makers and helps them to make their aspirations a reality

programme.title: Make It at Market
programme.desc: Labourer Mike has a passion for turning wooden bowls but feels held back by his perfectionist attitude to his creations. During the pandemic Sarah quit her job and took up pottery, but has been struggling to make enough money from it to live on. With the help and advice of Dom Chinea and his team of experts, Mike and Sarah try their best to create smooth running businesses out of their crafts and turn their hobbies into a day job

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: The team is under pressure with a record number of cars to auction, but Derek finds room for one more - a replica AC Cobra. A couple are reunited with their Volvo breakdown truck

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A classic car fan with a love of the Jaguar E-Type reluctantly sends his dream car to auction, hoping to buy a motorhome with the money. Two Ford Escorts get Dave's pulse racing

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution
programme.desc: Examining the complex system the Nazis set up to implement the extermination of the Jewish race throughout Europe from 1942, with Auschwitz as the hub. The programme reveals that at other camps, including Treblinka, Belzec and Sobibor, rival commanders participated in the genocide with enthusiasm and shared ideas for the best method of mass murder

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.sub-title: The First Six Months in Power
programme.desc: It is 1933 and Adolf Hitler is the chancellor of Germany, but he does not have absolute power as there is still a democratic parliament, a head of state and the rule of law. Hitler calls a general election to increase Nazi representation, but a fire in the Reichstag building is blamed on communists - prompting thousands of arrests of left-wingers. Hitler then calls on President von Hindenburg to act and a decree is passed giving the Nazis emergency powers to ban free speech and the right to protest

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team look back at the series and choose their favourite moments. The programme features updates on items of high value, including footage from an auction in which a £1 boot-sale purchase became the best investment in Roadshow history

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team value items at Jersey's Samares Manor, where the experts discover a variety of items with international origins. Artefacts examined include a lemon squeezer said to have been owned by Marilyn Monroe, and a forensics test is carried out to determine the value of a gold bangle

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek rubs shoulders with pop music royalty when he picks up a Morgan sports car, while a Second World War ambulance arrives at Thornton le Dale

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: The Mathewsons take in a 1982 Audi Quattro and a Sunbeam Alpine. Plus, Derek takes delivery of a beautiful green Renault van, previously used as a bread van in Paris

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming explores the English canal network, beginning with a journey from Shardlow to Etruria Junction, Stoke on Trent, exploring the Trent and Mersey Canal. However, not everything goes to plan, and he will have to deal with a tricky issue with his propeller as well as navigating the complicated locks on the Trent and Mersey Canal

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming explores life on the English canal network. A low canal tunnel in Staffordshire proves to be problematic and Robbie helps out a stranded boater

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek checks out an abandoned 1985 Renault 4 and an MGB Roadster that hasn't seen the light of day for 36 years, and Jack heads to Rotherham to pick up a pair of rare Bond Bugs.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team seek out a sturdy, reliable 4x4 to tackle the rugged Yorkshire landscape, but get side-tracked into a slightly rusty Subaru Impreza Turbo 2000

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek rubs shoulders with pop music royalty when he picks up a Morgan sports car, while a Second World War ambulance arrives at Thornton le Dale

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: There's a surprise for Derek in Hull - an MGSA sports car that once had a tree growing through it. Plus, in North Wales, Alan Holmes is selling his son's Ford Escort RS 1600i

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Gus has his eye on a Citroen XM that looks amazing - but it's in France. If they can double their money, it'll be worth the trip, but the car has some big problems. Will isn't sure, but the engineering challenges win him over

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Max McMurdo restore and upcycle 2CV headlamps, a children's rocking horse, a Victorian streetlamp and a high chair

programme.title: James May's Cars of the People
programme.desc: The presenter examines how the car industry in Germany and Japan blossomed following the Second World War, becoming manufacturing giants that far outstripped the Allied nations that had defeated them. He test drives some of the vehicles Germany and Japan produced during the post-war period, as well as an assortment of other classic cars, including E-Types and Mustangs. He also reveals the sad tale of the Austin Allegro, a vehicle that had a devastating impact on the British car industry

programme.title: Bangers & Cash

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution
programme.desc: A look at how corruption became rife within the SS, with the money stolen from Jews finding its way into the pockets of the camp guards rather than funding the war effort. Many of the SS also enjoyed illicit sexual relationships with female prisoners. Meanwhile, Dr Mengele embarked on a gruesome series of experiments, using children as guinea pigs in his research into genetic inheritance

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: The final episode examines the infamous Night of the Long Knives in late June and early July of 1934, when Adolf Hitler - urged on by Hermann Goering and Heinrich Himmler - ordered a series of political executions on those seen as a threat to the Nazi regime. The most well-known of these was Ernst Roehm, commander and co-founder of the Sturmabteilung, the Nazi Party's militia, whom Hitler had come to see as a potential rival. At least 85 people died during the purge, although the final death toll may have been in the hundreds
